title: Best Costume Design Odds | Oscar Predictions, Favorites, 2026 Academy Awards Betting Guide
text: Frankenstein dominates the Best Costume Design race at the 2026 Academy Awards with an overwhelming 92% probability of winning. The remaining contenders are Sinners at 7%, Marty Supreme at 3%, Avatar: Fire and Ash at 1%, and Hamnet at 1%. According to analyst Collin Whitchurch, there's a compelling case for Sinners, primarily due to costume designer Ruth E. Carter's track record. Carter has won her last two nominations in this category, both Black Panther films directed by Ryan Coogler. However, Whitchurch notes that Frankenstein's commanding lead is well-justified. The film won at the Critics Choice Awards, BAFTAs, and most notably at the CDG under the Period category. These significant precursor wins make Frankenstein the clear frontrunner. Whitchurch's assessment suggests there's a reason Frankenstein is so big of a favorite, and he is staying away from a betting perspective. The 2026 Oscars ceremony takes place March 15 at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, hosted by Conan O'Brien.
